'''kogabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:okadaic|okadaic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okadaic|okadaic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kogabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogabithi|kogabithi]] || [[word:kogabiji|kogabiji]] || [[word:kogabishi|kogabishi]] || [[word:kogabiki|kogabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogabuthuthu|kogabuthuthu]] || [[word:kogabujuju|kogabujuju]] || [[word:kogabushushu|kogabushushu]] || [[word:kogabukuku|kogabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogabuthu|kogabuthu]] || [[word:kogabuju|kogabuju]] || [[word:kogabushu|kogabushu]] || [[word:kogabuku|kogabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogabufthuf|kogabufthuf]] || [[word:kogabufjuf|kogabufjuf]] || [[word:kogabufshuf|kogabufshuf]] || [[word:kogabufkuf|kogabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogabethe|kogabethe]] || [[word:kogabeje|kogabeje]] || [[word:kogabeshe|kogabeshe]] || [[word:kogabeke|kogabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogabothotho|kogabothotho]] || [[word:kogabojojo|kogabojojo]] || [[word:kogaboshosho|kogaboshosho]] || [[word:kogabokoko|kogabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogabotho|kogabotho]] || [[word:kogabojo|kogabojo]] || [[word:kogabosho|kogabosho]] || [[word:kogaboko|kogaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogabofthof|kogabofthof]] || [[word:kogabofjof|kogabofjof]] || [[word:kogabofshof|kogabofshof]] || [[word:kogabofkof|kogabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfthÃŸf|kogabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfjÃŸf|kogabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfshÃŸf|kogabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfkÃŸf|kogabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kogabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kogabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kogabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kogabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfthÃŸf|kogabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfjÃŸf|kogabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfshÃŸf|kogabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfkÃŸf|kogabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfthÃŸf|kogabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfjÃŸf|kogabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfshÃŸf|kogabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogabÃŸfkÃŸf|kogabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogabÃḊthÃḊ|kogabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kogabÃḊjÃḊ|kogabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kogabÃḊshÃḊ|kogabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kogabÃḊkÃḊ|kogabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogabathatha|kogabathatha]] || [[word:kogabajaja|kogabajaja]] || [[word:kogabashasha|kogabashasha]] || [[word:kogabakaka|kogabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogabatha|kogabatha]] || [[word:kogabaja|kogabaja]] || [[word:kogabasha|kogabasha]] || [[word:kogabaka|kogabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogabafthaf|kogabafthaf]] || [[word:kogabafjaf|kogabafjaf]] || [[word:kogabafshaf|kogabafshaf]] || [[word:kogabafkaf|kogabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kogabasha|kogabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogabshÃḋsha|kogabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogabrosha|kogabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogabmusha|kogabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogabyasha|kogabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogabnkshÃḋsha|gokogabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogabnkrosha|gokogabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogabnkmusha|gokogabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogabnkyasha|gokogabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kogagabasha|kogagabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogagabshÃḋsha|kogagabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogagabrosha|kogagabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogagabmusha|kogagabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogagabyasha|kogagabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogagabnkshÃḋsha|gokogagabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogagabnkrosha|gokogagabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogagabnkmusha|gokogagabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogagabnkyasha|gokogagabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kegÃḊbasha|kegÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kegÃḊbshÃḋsha|kegÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kegÃḊbrosha|kegÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kegÃḊbmusha|kegÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kegÃḊbyasha|kegÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokegÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gokegÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokegÃḊbnkrosha|gokegÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokegÃḊbnkmusha|gokegÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokegÃḊbnkyasha|gokegÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kogfabasha|kogfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogfabshÃḋsha|kogfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogfabrosha|kogfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogfabmusha|kogfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogfabyasha|kogfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogfabnkshÃḋsha|gokogfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogfabnkrosha|gokogfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogfabnkmusha|gokogfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogfabnkyasha|gokogfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
